quotes.text: The best code review comment is 'LGTM' after 0 seconds of review. The most honest is 'I'll look at this tomorrow' repeated 47 times.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SLA should be honest. If you can't hit 99.9%, don't promise it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best team retrospectives are the ones where people actually say what they think. Not what they think the boss wants to hear.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build trust is to be honest. Even when it hurts.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing should be as honest as your product. If it's not, you're building a house of cards.
quotes.author: based
